Rolled back to the state before version 196 ("change the  backup  color of the  home page  to dark green and the home page navbar background color to orange")

In the exact same format, look, feel, style  and professionalism of the current testimonials on the  home page, please add this list of testimonials below the the ones  currently on the site:

Anonymous
2 years ago
Dr. Sabina Nasir is a highly skilled dentist. I have been with this practice for years. The staff are friendly. My teeth are in good order thanks to everyone here. I highly recommend this dentist and dental practice.

Gary Smith
2 years ago
Following my recent treatments, I felt compelled to write to say thank you. I have been an NHS patient with the practice since I was a young boy, and at 65 I’ve seen many dentists in my time.

I am extremely impressed with how the dental profession has advanced in both treatment and professionalism. The care I am receiving now is the best I’ve ever experienced—not only in the quality of dentistry, but also in the clarity of communication and the kindness shown when I am clearly concerned and in pain.

I no longer fear going to the dentist—in fact, it’s almost a pleasure. I look forward to my six-month check-ups and hygiene visits. Thank you all once again, and I hope you have a fantastic Christmas (apologies if that’s a bit early). See you in the New Year.

Keith Langford
2 years ago
Very happy with the dental surgery. If you have an issue with your teeth, they try to find an appointment as soon as possible. At a check-up, Sabina will address problems immediately if she is able to do so. I have been with the practice for years and have seen the effects of limited NHS funding, but Sabina works hard to maintain this side of the service.

H
2 years ago
Happy with this practice. Sabina is doing her best in difficult circumstances. I’m not a fan of going to the dentist and see it as a necessary evil, but she is understanding and helps ease my anxiety. I’ve been to quite a few dentists over the years, and this is as good as—or better than—any of them.

Amanda Penner
2 years ago
Excellent dental surgery with such kind and friendly staff. Their genuine attention to ensuring you are comfortable and at ease during your appointment is outstanding.

I especially appreciate their focus on oral care awareness and maintaining healthy hygiene. They are true champions of healthy teeth. I would highly recommend this surgery.

Andrea Edlin
2 years ago
Delapre Dental Care is really, really good. Sabina is an excellent dentist—so patient, highly skilled, and she explains everything clearly. I am a terrible coward when it comes to dentists, but she puts me completely at ease. I’m so glad she is my dentist, and the NHS is lucky to have her.

Marta
7 months ago
I have nothing but praise for Sabina and her team. I have always been anxious about the dentist, but Sabina and Malyha always put me at ease. The dental care I have received over the years has been excellent.

I am truly grateful for everything she has done for me. Her dedication and commitment to her patients are second to none. Thank you, Sabina and team.

Helen Badcock
6 months ago
It’s always nice to see the same friendly dentist who explains things clearly. I’ve never had any problems with my treatment.

Sodapop Peters (on behalf of Jenny Clifford)
6 months ago
I would like to express my sincere gratitude to Delapre Dental Care for restoring my confidence and easing my fears about dentists. I had not attended a dental surgery for over 30 years, but in the caring and capable hands of Sabina—the wonderful dentist who owns the practice—and her friendly dental nurse, I no longer have any fear.

I can’t thank them enough. An excellent dental practice.

Josephine Masters (on behalf of Mrs. Bazeley and Mrs. McFarlane)
1 month ago
My mother needed an emergency appointment, and Sabina saw her immediately. She required a tooth extraction, and Sabina was brilliant. She made my mother, who suffers from Alzheimer’s, feel comfortable and at ease. She remained calm, kind, and patient without ever being patronizing.

remove these testimonials from the home page:

A Calm and Gentle Experience
"I've always been a nervous patient, but Dr Nasir completely changed my perspective on dental visits. She is incredibly patient, explains every step of the process, and has a very gentle touch. The clinic on Billing Road is professional and welcoming. I couldn't recommend her more highly for anyone looking for quality NHS or private care."
— Sarah J.
Exceptional Care and Results
"I recently visited Dr Sabina Nasir for some restorative work, and I am thrilled with the results. Her attention to detail is second to none, and she truly cares about her patients' comfort. It's great to have such a high-calibre dentist right here in Northampton."
— David R.
The Best Dentist in Northampton
"Dr Nasir and her team at Delapre Dental Care provide world-class service. From the moment you walk in, you feel like you're in good hands. Dr Nasir is knowledgeable, professional, and took the time to answer all my questions about my treatment plan."
— Michael L.

in a fashion that is in accordance with the look and feel and style of the website, please add this as  a new section in the About Us page:

A Safe Environment for All
We pride ourselves on the quality of care we provide and ask that our patients treat our team with the same respect they receive. Following NHS national policy, we do not tolerate aggression or abuse.

We kindly ask that you refrain from:

Aggressive, threatening, or violent behavior.

Verbal abuse, including shouting or swearing.

Any form of discrimination or harassment.

Damage to our facilities or the use of illegal substances on-site.

Our Policy: To protect our staff and patients, we reserve the right to terminate the patient-provider relationship and remove individuals from our list if these standards are not met. Formal reports of all incidents are reviewed by Dr. Sabina Nasir and recorded in our clinical safety logs.

add these testimonials to the home page

At a follow-up appointment on 12/02/2026, my mother required two more extractions. Once again, Sabina was faultless. Considering my mother is 92 and has Alzheimer’s, the care she received was exceptional. With the help of her assistant (apologies for any misspelling), extra time was taken to ensure she was comfortable. My mother is now pain-free, healing well, and even looking forward to her next visit. Thank you, Sabina and team. I highly recommend this practice, especially for Alzheimer’s patients.
— Mrs. June Bazeley

Linda Gray
2 months ago
As someone who is very nervous about dentists, I can honestly say this practice is excellent. I am an NHS patient in my seventies and am always treated with the utmost respect and consideration.
The treatment I receive is of the highest quality, and Sabina and her team are always caring and mindful of their patients’ circumstances. I highly recommend them.

Julie F
Recent
I feel very privileged to have a dentist. I have nothing but praise for Sabina and her team, especially given the challenges they face in the current climate.
Sabina is extremely pleasant, and the staff are wonderful. I have been with this practice for many years and have no complaints whatsoever. When we need help, we should show these professionals appreciation, not criticism—they are essential.

Danielle
Recent
Perfect! I couldn’t fault the service or the effort to get me treated highly enough. A professional yet relaxed practice. I would recommend it to everyone.

⚠️ Important Notice. These Terms & Conditions apply to all patients receiving treatment at Delapre Dental Care. Please read them carefully. If you have any questions, please contact us on 01604 636836 or email info@delapredental.com.
